acquisition method: The LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer was operated in data dependent mode
alkylation reagent: treated with 5 mM iodoacetimide at 25 °C for 30 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: treated with 5 mM iodoacetimide at 25 °C for 30 min in the dark
cleavage agent: Purified proteins were cleaved by trypsin and subjected to LC-MS/MS
collision energy: the other parameters for mass spectrometry analysis were: resolution of MS1 was set at 60,000, normalized collision energy 35%
enrichment method: Lysates were subjected to tandem affinity chromatography with the Ni-NTA resin and streptavidin-agarose
fragmentation method: the ten most intense ions were selected from fragmentation by CID
instrument: The LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer was operated in data dependent mode
ionization type: the peptides were directly eluted into an LTQ Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer at Northwestern University (Thermo Scientific, San Jose, CA, USA) electrospray ionization
reduction reagent: treated with 1 mM DTT at 25 °C for 30 min
reduction concentration: treated with 1 mM DTT at 25 °C for 30 min
